name: Welsh Rabbit
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 2-quart saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in milk.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
6. Boil and stir 1 minute.
7. Gradually stir wine into the sauce mixture; stir in cheese.
8. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly until cheese is melted.
9. Serve over toast. Sprinkle with paprika if desired.
